Senior Product Engineer, Canada

Location

Remote - Canada; Calgary; Edmonton; Montreal; Toronto; Vancouver; Waterloo

Employment Type

Full time

Location Type

Remote

Department

EngineeringAmericas Engineering

Compensation

  • Toronto & VancouverCA$163K – CA$200K • Offers Equity
  • Canada - All Other LocationsCA$151K – CA$184K • Offers Equity

Please read Engineering Levels and Compensation to learn how we level Engineers and approach compensation across different locations.

The posted range represents the typical compensation range for this role. To determine actual compensation we review the market rate of each candidate which can include a variety of factors including qualifications, experience, and location. Additional benefits are shared as part of the job posting.

Upload your resume here to autofill key application fields.

Drop your resume here!
Parsing your resume. Autofilling key fields...
This job has application limits

Please note: to ensure that candidates select the most relevant jobs for their skills, we have set up limits to the number of times candidates can apply. The following limits apply to all roles at Ashby:

  • Candidates may not apply more than 3 times in any 60 days for any job

  • Candidates may not re-apply to the same role within 180 days if not presented with an offer

Basic Info

or drag and drop here

Please list your city and country.

We're only looking for Senior+ engineers at the moment.

Please limit your answer to no more than three paragraphs.

Answer 1 of 3 Questions

We’d like you to answer only one of the three questions in this section. Answer the one you feel has the strongest answer. Limit your answer to four paragraphs or less. Please do not answer more than one - we will reject candidates who do.

We're interested in what made your approach different, why you believed in it, and how you brought others along. Don't feel the need to focus on the technical specificities. Instead, share the journey and ultimate impacts of your decision. Did it shift how your team thought about the problem?

We want to understand who the users were, what was being asked of you and why, and how you identified the opportunity to do better. Walk us through how you made your case, what gave you confidence in your position, and what the outcome was — including what was (or wasn’t) shipped.

This doesn't need to be a formal project, but we'd ask that it has a professional context: a problem, a pattern, or a question that kept nagging at you. What was the thread you pulled, where did it lead, and what did you do with what you found?

Diversity Survey

This optional survey helps us evaluate our diversity and inclusion efforts. Participation is voluntary and refusal to submit the survey will not affect your job application. The answers to these questions are not seen on an individualized basis and your submission will only be used to assess our diversity and inclusion efforts.

Recruiting Privacy Policy

Ashby may use Artificial Intelligence with this application. Learn more.
